revision.comment: Bot: update/create Tier‑4 category
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 5 Categories]] [[en:Category:1936 in international relations]] [[Category:Tier 5 Categories with enwiki]] [[ja:Category:1936年の国際関係]] [[ar:Category:علاقات دولية في 1936]] [[bs:Category:1936. u međunarodnim odnosima]] [[ckb:Category:پەیوەندییە نێونەتەوەیییەکان لە ١٩٣٦]] [[commons:Category:1936 in international relations]] [[fa:Category:روابط بین‌الملل در ۱۹۳۶ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Relations internationales en 1936]] [[hy:Category:1936 միջազգային հարաբերություններում]] [[id:Category:Hubungan internasional dalam tahun 1936]] [[ko:Category:1936년 국제 관계]] [[no:Category:Internasjonale relasjoner i 1936]] [[pt:Category:1936 nas relações internacionais]] [[ru:Category:1936 год в международных отношениях]] [[tr:Category:1936'da uluslararası ilişkiler]] [[ur:Category:1936ء میں بین الاقوامی تعلقات]] [[vi:Category:Quan hệ quốc tế năm 1936]] [[zh:Category:1936年國際關係]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:Battles_in_1936]].

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]][[category:Categories created from enwiki title]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]] <!--this is here to get the bot to work--> "
Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)
Text replacement - "[[en:Category:Category:" to "[[en:Category:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:Category:Category:" to "[[ja:Category:"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:

revision.text:

revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
